retrieved_result: User Authentication on the Solaris OS Part 3: PAM Conversation Functions (Solaris PAM API article, unrelated to Docker).
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses Solaris PAM authentication, not Docker; no content about Docker setup for beginners; thus not relevant.
combined_text_for_llm: User Authentication on the Solaris OS Part 3: PAM Conversation Functions "User Authentication on the Solaris OS Part 3: PAM Conversation Functions By Rich Teer, September 2007Learn to use the conversation functions of the PAM (Pluggable Authentication Modules) API and examine a sample program. Contents Introduction Conversation Functions An Example Conversation Function
